creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Tue Oct 29 02:07:34 2013
New Revision: 331922
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331922

Log:
  - Add new port databases/luadbi
  
  LuaDBI is a database interface library for Lua.
  It is designed to provide a RDBMS agnostic API
  for handling database operations.
  
  WWW: http://code.google.com/p/luadbi/
  
  PR:		ports/183079
  Submitted by:	Olexander Melnyk <olexander.v.melnyk@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/databases/luadbi/
  head/databases/luadbi/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/luadbi/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/luadbi/files/
  head/databases/luadbi/files/patch-Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/luadbi/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/databases/Makefile

Modified: head/databases/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/Makefile	Tue Oct 29 02:03:55 2013	(r331921)
+++ head/databases/Makefile	Tue Oct 29 02:07:34 2013	(r331922)
@@ -185,6 +185,7 @@
     SUBDIR += liquibase
     SUBDIR += lmdb
     SUBDIR += lsdb
+    SUBDIR += luadbi
     SUBDIR += luasql-mysql
     SUBDIR += luasql-postgres
     SUBDIR += luasql-sqlite3

Added: head/databases/luadbi/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/luadbi/Makefile	Tue Oct 29 02:07:34 2013	(r331922)
@@ -0,0 +1,67 @@
+# Created by: Olexander Melnyk <olexander.v.melnyk@gmail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	luadbi
+PORTVERSION=	0.5
+CATEGORIES=	databases
+MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}.${PORTVERSION}
+
+MAINTAINER=	olexander.v.melnyk@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	LuaDBI driver
+
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+NO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
+
+USE_LUA=	5.1
+USES=	gmake
+
+CFLAGS+=	-fpic -I${LOCALBASE}/include -I${LUA_INCDIR} -I. \
+		-I${LOCALBASE}/include/postgresql/server
+LDFLAGS+=	-shared -L${LOCALBASE}/lib -L${LUA_LIBDIR}
+MAKE_ENV+=	COMMON_LDFLAGS="${LDFLAGS}"
+
+OPTIONS_MULTI=	DATABASE
+OPTIONS_MULTI_DATABASE=	MYSQL SQLITE3 PGSQL
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	MYSQL
+
+PLIST_FILES=	%%LUA_MODSHAREDIR%%/DBI.lua
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMYSQL}
+USE_MYSQL=	yes
+LDFLAGS+=	-L ${LOCALBASE}/lib/mysql
+CFLAGS+=	-I ${LOCALBASE}/include/mysql
+ALL_TARGET+=	mysql
+PLIST_FILES+=	%%LUA_MODLIBDIR%%/dbdmysql.so
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSQLITE3}
+USE_SQLITE=	3
+ALL_TARGET+=	sqlite3
+PLIST_FILES+=	%%LUA_MODLIBDIR%%/dbdsqlite3.so
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPGSQL}
+USE_PGSQL=	yes
+ALL_TARGET+=	psql
+PLIST_FILES+=	%%LUA_MODLIBDIR%%/dbdpostgresql.so
+.endif
+
+do-install:
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${LUA_MODLIBDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${LUA_MODSHAREDIR}
+	${CP} ${WRKSRC}/DBI.lua ${STAGEDIR}${LUA_MODSHAREDIR}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMYSQL}
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/dbdmysql.so ${STAGEDIR}${LUA_MODLIBDIR}
+.endif
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSQLITE3}
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/dbdsqlite3.so ${STAGEDIR}${LUA_MODLIBDIR}
+.endif
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPGSQL}
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/dbdpostgresql.so ${STAGEDIR}${LUA_MODLIBDIR}
+.endif
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/databases/luadbi/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/luadbi/distinfo	Tue Oct 29 02:07:34 2013	(r331922)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (luadbi.0.5.tar.gz) = 49116458dd80052536bf5d7e2b2a1f5a0fa42a671ce77f1cb7355ef7faeb331e
+SIZE (luadbi.0.5.tar.gz) = 22454

Added: head/databases/luadbi/files/patch-Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/luadbi/files/patch-Makefile	Tue Oct 29 02:07:34 2013	(r331922)
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+--- Makefile.orig	2010-07-16 09:22:13.000000000 +0300
++++ Makefile	2013-10-17 18:24:00.000000000 +0300
+@@ -1,11 +1,8 @@
+-CC=gcc
+-CFLAGS=-g -pedantic -Wall -O2 -shared -fpic -I /usr/include/lua5.1 -I /usr/include/mysql -I /usr/include/postgresql/ -I /opt/ibm/db2exc/V9.5/include/ -I /usr/lib/oracle/xe/app/oracle/product/10.2.0/client/rdbms/public/ -I .
+ AR=ar rcu
+ RANLIB=ranlib
+ RM=rm -rf
+ MKDIR=mkdir -p
+ 
+-COMMON_LDFLAGS=
+ MYSQL_LDFLAGS=$(COMMON_LDFLAGS) -lmysqlclient
+ PSQL_LDFLAGS=$(COMMON_LDFLAGS) -lpq 
+ SQLITE3_LDFLAGS=$(COMMON_LDFLAGS) -lsqlite3 

Added: head/databases/luadbi/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/luadbi/pkg-descr	Tue Oct 29 02:07:34 2013	(r331922)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+LuaDBI is a database interface library for Lua.
+It is designed to provide a RDBMS agnostic API for handling database operations.
+
+WWW: http://code.google.com/p/luadbi/
